summary: Single mother of two minor children facing eviction in 48 hours. Landlord claims unpaid rent during COVID hardship. Section 8 housing voucher approval pending. Landlord did not provide proper HUD notice.
Nigerian national with approved asylum claim facing removal proceedings in 72 hours. Final removal order issued despite pending appeal. Attorney may have missed deadline filing.
Elderly Vietnamese woman age 72 with kidney dialysis three times weekly facing eviction for noise complaint from medical equipment. Landlord failed to engage in reasonable accommodation process.
Former hospital IT manager wrongfully terminated after reporting HIPAA violations. COBRA insurance deadline tomorrow. Missing this date means 18-month gap in cancer treatment coverage.
Domestic violence survivor in DV shelter with two children. Served eviction notice while fleeing safety. Emergency housing voucher application pending approval.
Restaurant kitchen worker owed 18400 dollars in unpaid overtime over 14 months. Employer closed business and reopened under LLC to avoid wage claims. Fraudulent transfer pattern documented.
Mother seeking modification of custody order after father relocated 380 miles without court approval. Children enrolled in new school district. Existing order requires consent for relocation.
Mexican farm worker family of five facing eviction from employer housing after agricultural injury claim. Employer combining eviction with termination of workers compensation claim.

Software engineer with EEOC right-to-sue letter 87 days ago. 90-day filing deadline approaching. Gender and national origin discrimination after being passed over for promotion despite higher qualifications.

Haitian national with pending asylum claim whose work authorization expired during USCIS processing delay. Employer terminated for lack of authorization. USCIS issued auto-extension notice 3 months later.
